tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) - Presentation to Community Board 9, September 2016

payload.title: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53)
payload.description: Presentation to Community Board 9 about Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service project. Covers overview, community engagement, spring feedback follow-up, implementation, and project timeline.

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT short-term implementation project
MTA NYCT conducts random fare payment inspections
Presentation to Community Board 9 | September 13, 2016

tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Select Bus Service
payload.description: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with bus lanes, median SBS stations, and traffic safety improvements. Based on the existing Q52/53 Limited bus route. 30,000+ daily bus riders. 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

payload.limits: 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways
payload.description: Important north/south transit corridor for Queens. Provides connections to 8 subway lines, 20+ bus routes, and LIRR. Based on the existing Q52/53 Limited bus route.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor • Based on the existing Q52/53 Limited bus route • 30,000+ daily bus riders • 14 miles long from Woodside to the Rockaways • Important north/south transit corridor for Queens • Provides connections to 8 subway lines, 20+ bus routes, and LIRR
